task: Add a dedicated copy button for table outputs in the CodeMie UI by extracting the table markdown token into a new React component with a clipboard overlay following the MermaidDiagram.tsx pattern.

key_reasoning.reason: Change is confined to 2–3 components within the Markdown token rendering pipeline: MarkdownTokens.tsx (route table token to new component), new TableBlock.tsx, and optionally Markdown.utils.ts. No cross-cutting concerns, no subsystem boundaries crossed.

Requirements are clear and specific (extract token, follow MermaidDiagram pattern, copy-to-clipboard overlay, accessibility). One open question: whether to copy markdown pipe-table syntax (token.raw) or convert to TSV for spreadsheet compatibility — this requires a decision before implementation.

An exact structural precedent exists: MermaidDiagram.tsx demonstrates token extraction to a React component with absolute-positioned button overlay. CodeBlock.tsx provides the copy button pattern. The primary CSS nuance (button fixed while table scrolls horizontally) is directly solved by the absolute top-0 right-0 z-10 pattern from MermaidDiagram.

Estimated 3–4 files: MarkdownTokens.tsx (modified), Markdown.utils.ts (possibly minor change), new TableBlock.tsx, new __tests__/TableBlock.test.tsx. All within src/components/markdown/ directory tree.
